project: kcl/tinifile — port of FPC fcl-base TIniFile/TMemIniFile to bash (kklass instantiable classes, TMemIniFile : TIniFile)
status: PLANNED — plan + ledger only, no implementation yet. Roadmap position 4/7.
notes: Single source of truth for tinifile status. Plan: kcl/tinifile/PLAN.md. Source: packages/fcl-base/src/inifiles.pp (TCustomIniFile :159-218 folded into bash TIniFile; TIniFile :222-259 = eager persist, CacheUpdates=false; TMemIniFile :261-269 = cached until UpdateFile; TIniFileOption :143-152; format constants :279-283). INI'S SPEC IS THE FPC READER — P0 pins every format rule (S1-S12) from FillSectionList/UpdateFile before any code. Line-oriented format -> perfect bash fit: fork-free while-read parse, assoc storage, default-based Read* API (missing key -> caller default, rc=0 always). Entirely Tier A. Workflow: phase -> dual-bash -> master sweep -> STOP -> 'go'; commits gated.

baseline.measured: 2026-07-12 — at roadmap planning time (post-tdictionary). RE-MEASURE at P0: roadmap units 1-3 will have raised the totals.

suites_green.kcl_breakdown: tcustomapplication 320, tdirectory 197, tfile 120, tlist 92, tpath 112, tstringhelper 393, tstringlist 155, dateutils 123, math 81, tdictionary 130

baseline.regression_rule: tinifile work must keep the (re-measured) baseline green; the new tinifile suite adds on top.

design_decisions.class_split: Mirrors FPC exactly: both classes memory-backed; TIniFile flushes per Write* (CacheUpdates=false), TMemIniFile : TIniFile caches until UpdateFile. TCustomIniFile abstract base FOLDED into TIniFile (an abstract bash class is pure dispatch tax; mapping documented in docs).
design_decisions.storage: ${inst}_kv assoc keyed "secKey\x1fidKey" (lookup-normalized names); ${inst}_secorder indexed (sections, first-appearance order, original case); ${inst}_keyorder assoc (per-section \x1f-joined ident list) -> UpdateFile preserves section/key ORDER exactly. \x1f (US) is the single reserved char in section/ident names (validated rc=1 at every public entry). Subscripts never empty by construction (no k-prefix needed — pinned by torture test). Comment/blank-line preservation model decided at P0 from FPC reader behavior.
design_decisions.case_rule: FPC default = case-INSENSITIVE lookups; ${var,,} normalization for the kv key, original first-appearance case kept for write-back; ifoCaseSensitive flips. Beyond-ASCII lowercasing is locale-dependent (documented). Exact FPC rewrite-case rule pinned at P0.
design_decisions.file_io: Read: while IFS= read -r || [[ -n $line ]]; strip one trailing \r per line (CRLF tolerance); strip UTF-8 BOM on first line. Write: compose in memory -> printf to tmp in SAME dir -> mv over target (mv = the only fork, UpdateFile-only). LF written (CRLF not preserved — divergence row if FPC differs).
design_decisions.float_policy: ReadFloat/WriteFloat are STRING-PRESERVING: shape-validated, byte-lossless passthrough; NO float engine dependency (kcl/math is the arithmetic tool). Documented divergence: FPC canonicalizes through Double, we do not. Same no-parity-theater philosophy as tdictionary API v2.
design_decisions.error_convention: Read* never fails (default-based). Structural failures only (bad args, \x1f in names, unwritable target): rc=1 + debug-only msg; eager-write failure keeps memory state (FPC raises EInOutError — divergence documented).

goals: Faithful FPC INI dialect: every format rule (comments, duplicates, whitespace, quotes, sections) pinned from FillSectionList at P0 and enforced by tests — no folklore INI behavior.
Round-trip fidelity: load -> UpdateFile preserves section/key order (and comments if FPC does); write->read closure for every typed accessor.
Default-based Read API with the empty-value-vs-absent-key distinction intact.
Fork-free everything except the single mv in UpdateFile; PATH='' tests on in-memory paths.
TIniFile eager vs TMemIniFile cached persistence split proven by tests.

test_basis.seed_primary: packages/fcl-base/tests checked for inifile fpcunit coverage at P0 (mined if present). Primary basis: S1-S12 source pins + round-trip/closure properties.

parity_model.tier_A_exact: Parse results, typed conversions (S5/S6 rules), order preservation, persistence timing (eager vs cached), silent-miss semantics — byte-for-byte vs source-pinned behavior.

test_basis.new_coverage_protocol: Non-FPC cases (CRLF/BOM/no-final-NL torture, \x1f rejects, zero-fork, string-preserving floats) -> TEST_COVERAGE_NOTES.md rows.

out_of_scope.item: TEncoding machinery, BOM writing, WriteBOM, non-UTF8 encodings
out_of_scope.reason: bash strings are bytes; UTF-8 BOM tolerated+stripped on read, never written. Documented.
Locale-datetime machinery out of v1; a dateutils bridge is a possible later extra (noted, not promised).
TStream + NUL bytes — impossible in bash strings.
Internal representation; replaced by kv+order storage (design_decisions.storage).
P0 DECISION: port if it is a simple join-on-read in FPC; wontfix v1 if it entangles the writer. Resolved at P0.1.

phases.name: Reader-semantics pinning + storage freeze + skeleton
phases.goal: Fill the S1-S12 table from inifiles.pp impl; freeze storage incl. comment model; ctor token grammar; skeleton + runner; baseline re-measure.

tasks.acceptance: Every S-row resolved; storage model final; fcl-base tests checked for mineable seeds.

tasks.title: Skeleton (both classes, ctor tokens, fields) + storage torture (exotic names/values, \x1f rejects, never-empty subscripts) + runner + baseline re-measure
tasks.acceptance: source tinifile.sh green on both bashes; torture green; baseline recorded.

tasks.title: File parse per S-pins + read family (nameref fills + echo twins) + case-insensitivity matrix

tasks.title: Write family + order-preserving UpdateFile (tmp+mv) + TIniFile eager flush vs TMemIniFile cached + Clear/GetStrings/SetStrings/Rename
tasks.acceptance: Round-trip idempotence; order preservation proof; eager/cached split proven via file content between ops; Rename matrix (S11); silent-miss deletes (S7); dual-bash; sweep gate.

tasks.title: ReadInteger/ReadInt64 (S5 hex rules), ReadBool/WriteBool (S6 + BoolTrue/FalseStrings + ifoStringBoolean), ReadFloat/WriteFloat string-preserving, options behavior (CaseSensitive/StripComments/StripInvalid/StripQuotes[/EscapeLineFeeds])
tasks.acceptance: Typed write->read closure; malformed-value -> default (never error); option matrix green; dual-bash; sweep gate.

phases.name: Docs, bench, closeout
phases.goal: README + docs/TIniFile.md + bench + coverage notes + final sweep.

tasks.title: README.md (bash API, THE PINNED FORMAT RULES, divergences) + docs/TIniFile.md (upstream FPC reference per kcl docs convention, TCustomIniFile->TIniFile->TMemIniFile chain)
tasks.acceptance: Every public member + wontfix documented; format rules published as the contract.

tasks.title: bench.sh (load 1k keys, ReadString/WriteString hot, UpdateFile cost), timed via TStopwatch.getTimeStamp (shared kcl bench clock — source ../tstopwatch/tstopwatch.sh; do NOT hand-roll _now_us) + TEST_COVERAGE_NOTES finalization + final sweep, ledger COMPLETE
tasks.acceptance: Numbers recorded; final master sweep green.

execution_log.summary: tinifile PLAN.md + ledger written; folders created. No implementation. Key decisions recorded: FPC reader IS the format spec (S1-S12 pin table drives P0); TCustomIniFile folded, TIniFile eager / TMemIniFile cached split kept verbatim; \x1f-composite kv storage + explicit order arrays for round-trip fidelity; case-insensitive default with original-case write-back; string-preserving floats (no parity theater); tmp+mv single-fork writes.
